meta.name: Design Guidelines v3
meta.description: A readable, premium editorial dashboard system with optional warm and sage-ledger color editions.

display.usage: Headlines, navigation labels, KPIs, and section titles.

body.usage: Operational copy, tables, labels, helper text, and forms.

spacing.rule: Prefer larger outer spacing and tighter internal grouping for information-dense screens.

rules: Avoid decorative glow or scan effects.
State changes should feel calm and structural, not dramatic.

backgroundModes.sequoia: Photographic wallpaper test with palette-matched overlay

componentRules.panel: Use solid paper surfaces, explicit borders, restrained shadow, and consistent padding.
componentRules.button: Reserve the primary accent for the most important action only; secondary actions should stay neutral.
componentRules.input: Use soft neutral fill and subtle border emphasis instead of high-contrast focus glows.
componentRules.table: Use clear row dividers, compact headers, and high-contrast body text for long-session readability.

dashboardFit.tradeoff: Less atmospheric than liquid glass, but more trustworthy and scalable under higher information density.
